title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: AWS Developers video explains Identity and Access Management fundamentals in under 10 minutes, covering users, roles, policies, least privilege principle, and IAM Access Analyzer. The content emphasizes security best practices like avoiding hardcoded credentials and using temporary role credentials.
